Palak Chivda

પાલક ચીવડા

"Fresh spinach, crispy and full of colour."

Palak Chivda is a wholesome, crunchy mix of puffed rice, fried green moong, green peas and aromatic spices. Made with Navratri and health-conscious customers in mind, it is one of the lighter and more nutritious options in our range — but no less delicious.

Spice Level

🔴⚪⚪⚪ Very Mild

Shelf Life

15 days

Available In

250g · 500g

Best With

Morning tea

Order on WhatsApp ← Full Menu

How It's Made

કેવી રીતે બને છે

Every batch at SSKFG is made by hand, the same way it has been since 1951. No shortcuts. No machines doing what hands can do better.

1

Green moong is soaked and dried, then fried until crunchy.

2

Puffed rice and dried green peas are prepared separately.

3

All components are combined and tossed in a tempering of mustard seeds, curry leaves, green chillies and turmeric with a light hand of spices.

Ingredients

સામગ્રી

Puffed RiceGreen MoongDried Green PeasMustard SeedsCurry LeavesGreen ChilliesTurmericSaltVegetable Oil

✓ No major allergens
